text:
is the name given in-universe to the distinctive insignia of the Survey Corps. Other articles with this name include:

Die Flügel der Freiheit - The second opening of the Attack on Titan anime.
The Wings Of Freedom - The first chapter of the Attack on Titan: No Regrets manga.
Attack on Titan Part 2: Jiyuu no Tsubasa - The second compilation movie of the anime.
The Wings of Freedom (Chapter) - The 132nd chapter of the Attack on Titan manga.
The Wings of Freedom (Episode) - The 89th episode of the Attack on Titan anime.
